examples: She wore a checked pinafore and had ribbons in her hair.
A short blouse with sleeves worn under a jumper or pinafore dress.
She had a way of stamping she foot and twisting her hands in her pinafore...
The price for the blue and white gingham pinafore dress was in line with expectations, Julien's Auctions said.
For the hardy captain of the Pinafore.
